summary:
The child meets criteria for primary nocturnal enuresis without underlying medical conditions. First-line management should include both parent reassurance and initiation of enuresis alarm therapy, which demonstrates stronger efficacy and longer-lasting improvements compared to placebo or supportive care alone.  

\boxed{B}
